evals.name: session-loads-identity-automatically
evals.prompt: Load ai-brain skill at session start. Read identity files to understand who AI is and who the user is.
evals.expected_output: Should display AI.md and you.md content showing AI identity and user profile

evals.name: auto-learns-user-preferences
evals.prompt: During conversation, user mentions 'I prefer concise responses'. Update user profile automatically without being asked.
evals.expected_output: Should update you.md with the learned preference

evals.name: records-mistakes-automatically
evals.prompt: AI makes a mistake during conversation. Record the lesson learned in AI.md automatically.
evals.expected_output: Should update AI.md with lesson learned

evals.name: searches-past-memory
evals.prompt: User asks about a previous project mentioned in past sessions. Search memory using recall.sh.
evals.expected_output: Should find and display relevant past information

evals.name: auto-summarizes-session
evals.prompt: Session is ending with significant learnings. Auto-summarize and save to conversation history.
evals.expected_output: Should save session summary to conversation/history/
